planMd:
# Plan: IELTS Journey Full Website Redesign Implementation Plan

## Summary

Step-by-step plan to implement the full IELTS Journey website redesign based on the provided design documentation and specs.

## Tasks

1. Inspect Existing Project Structure and UI Code
2. Implement or Improve Theme and Design Token System (depends on: Inspect Existing Project Structure and UI Code)
3. Refine Existing Reusable UI Components per Redesign Specs (depends on: Implement or Improve Theme and Design Token System)
4. Create New Reusable UI Components per Redesign Requirements (depends on: Refine Existing Reusable UI Components per Redesign Specs)
5. Redesign Global Layout and Navigation Components (depends on: Create New Reusable UI Components per Redesign Requirements)
6. Redesign Dashboard Page as Main Learning Command Center (depends on: Redesign Global Layout and Navigation Components)
7. Redesign Today's Study Plan Page with New UI and States (depends on: Redesign Dashboard Page as Main Learning Command Center)
8. Redesign Full Study Roadmap Page with Visual Journey and AI Tutor Integration (depends on: Redesign Today's Study Plan Page with New UI and States)
9. Redesign AI Tutor Chat and Integration UI (depends on: Redesign Full Study Roadmap Page with Visual Journey and AI Tutor Integration)
10. Redesign Vocabulary Notebook and Vocabulary Review Pages (depends on: Redesign AI Tutor Chat and Integration UI)
11. Redesign Learning Progress and AI Progress Review Pages (depends on: Redesign Vocabulary Notebook and Vocabulary Review Pages)
12. Redesign Practice Pages (Reading, Listening, Writing, Speaking, Grammar) (depends on: Redesign Learning Progress and AI Progress Review Pages)
13. Redesign Saved Content and Mistake Review Pages (depends on: Redesign Practice Pages (Reading, Listening, Writing, Speaking, Grammar))
14. Redesign Settings and AI Provider Settings Pages (depends on: Redesign Saved Content and Mistake Review Pages)
15. Redesign Onboarding and Landing Pages (depends on: Redesign Settings and AI Provider Settings Pages)
16. Redesign Extension Connection Page (depends on: Redesign Onboarding and Landing Pages)
17. Implement Consistent Empty, Loading, and Error States Across All Pages (depends on: Redesign Extension Connection Page)
18. Perform Comprehensive Testing and Validation of Redesigned Website (depends on: Implement Consistent Empty, Loading, and Error States Across All Pages)
19. Generate Final Redesign Implementation Report (depends on: Perform Comprehensive Testing and Validation of Redesigned Website)
